title: Illogically Looping Lanterns
description: Randomly rotated lanterns and soul lanterns!
body:
A simple pack that makes lanterns and soul lanterns rotate in random directions.
<hr>

The rotation cannot be controlled by the player and is entirely dependent on the block the lantern is placed on
<hr>

NOTE: Versions 1.4 and above use a different set of rotations to give more subtle and natural-feeling rotations to the lanterns. Versions 1.4 and above are not compatible with any Minecraft versions below 1.21.6
<hr>

You can find all of my rotation packs in [this collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/Q0861PqC) :)
<center>
<hr>
